data.title: $7M memecoin to honor Hulk Hogan’s death turned into a scam
data.description:
A day after wrestling icon Hulk Hogan’s death, a wave of new meme coins flooded the market, but the largest token quickly proved to be a scam. Hogan, whose real name was Terry Bollea, passed away yesterday, setting off activity in the meme coin space. Almost immediately, a “Hulk Hogan Tribute” token appeared on decentralized […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/7m-scam-coin-hulk-hogan-death/

data.title: Polymarket puts 96.3% odds on no Fed cut next week despite Trump’s claim it’s ‘ready’ to ease
data.description:
Bettors on the Polygon-based prediction market Polymarket are assigning a 96. 3% probability that the Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged at its July 29–30 meeting, according to the platform’s contract covering the decision. On top of the percentage of bets on “no change,” the platform’s dashboard shows 3% betting on a 25‑basis‑point cut, and less […] The post Polymarket puts 96
source: https://cryptoslate.com/polymarket-puts-96-3-odds-on-no-fed-cut-next-week-despite-trumps-claim-its-ready-to-ease/

data.title: Trump pats Powell on the back and the internet is going crazy
data.description:
A heated on-site clash between President Trump and Fed Chair Powell over renovation costs sparks viral memes and rattles crypto markets, with Bitcoin sliding nearly 4%.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/trump-pats-powell-on-the-back-and-the-internet-is-going-crazy

data.title: Revolut Makes Crypto Staking Available in Hungary After Restricting Services
data.description:
Revolut has recently announced the launch of its crypto staking services in Hungary, a move that comes after a period during which the company had to restrict certain financial services in the region. This development marks a significant step forward for Hungarian users, allowing them to earn rewards on their cryptocurrency holdings. The service will enable customers to stake various cryptocurrencies, providing them with an opportunity to participate in the growing digital currency ecosystem while also benefiting from potential interest earnings. The reintroduction of these services reflects Revolut's commitment to expanding its offerings and catering to the evolving needs of its customer base in Hungary.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/07/25/revolut-makes-crypto-staking-available-in-hungary-after-restricting-services

data.title: Ripple skeptics spread conspiracy theories over its lost early 32,569 ledgers
data.description:
Ripple’s earliest ledger data from its June 2012 launch is irretrievably incomplete due to a server bug that erased the headers for the first 32,569 ledgers. The significant gap in the XRP Ledger’s transaction history has the community asking where the pre-mined 100 billion XRP went. Ripple’s CTO David Schwartz addressed the incident in a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-lost-its-first-32569-ledgers/

data.title: Ripple Executive Moves $200M in XRP – What’s Going On?

What factors may have influenced this decision, and what could it mean for the future of Ripple and the broader crypto market?"

data.title: Ethereum ETFs Are Outpacing Bitcoin as Institutional Demand Surges: Here is the Proof
data.description:
"Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are experiencing significant growth and outpacing their Bitcoin counterparts, driven by a remarkable surge in institutional demand. In this article, we present compelling evidence and data that support this trend, highlighting the factors contributing to Ethereum's increasing popularity among institutional investors and the implications it may have for the future of cryptocurrency investments."
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-etfs-are-outpacing-bitcoin-as-institutional-demand-surges-here-is-the-proof/

data.title: What is Hedera? Everything You Need to Know About HBAR for Beginners
data.description:
Hedera is a decentralized public network designed for creating and deploying decentralized applications (dApps) and services, and it operates using its native cryptocurrency called HBAR. In this comprehensive guide, we will cover everything you need to know about Hedera and HBAR, including its foundational technology, key features, use cases, and how it differs from other blockchain platforms, making it an essential resource for beginners who want to understand this innovative digital ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/what-is-hedera-everything-need-to-know-about-hbar-for-beginners/
